Dear Groww Team, It’s appreciated that you regularly bring updates and improvements to the app. However, in the recent update, the size of the Nifty 50 and Sensex view options have been reduced. Kindly make those buttons/options slightly bigger and easier to click, as they are important features that users access frequently. A larger and more visible touch area would improve the overall user experience. Thank you.

I’m disappointed with the Groww app and the support I received. Several times my orders were auto-executed or auto-cancelled without a clear reason, which caused confusion and potential financial loss. When I contacted customer service, the team was unable to resolve the issue and often used a rude, unhelpful tone. The inconsistent order behaviour combined with poor support makes the app unreliable for trading.

I repaid my dues on time, but despite three redemption requests my mutual fund is still blocked and I haven't received my money. I had taken a loan against my mutual fund through Grow and fully repaid it, yet customer support has given no satisfactory resolution. This caused serious financial hardship. I would not recommend using Grow for loans against mutual funds — please verify fund-release procedures and read reviews carefully before investing. verry verry  experience with u
